parameters: Well. That went about as badly as it could have.
I liked the part where he blamed us before
That makes him loud, not right.
King Blackwell would have listened first.
The King has ruled through famine, war, and
plague. The Duke has inherited a crisis.
He inherited a title. There is a difference.
Still, he is nothing like his father.
King Blackwell sees people clearly. Duke
Then perhaps we should make sure we do not
After that, the Duke hears the truth.
Assuming he knows how to listen by then.
The eastern bridge fell in one night. One night.
The Duke is young, but do not mistake that for weakness.
If the capital road remains broken, trade will bleed out
Do not quote me, but Athenaeum may be our best hope.
The Duke needs victories, not explanations.
I miss when the oudest thing in this place was noble gossip.
